item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 111 pts (0.457) Buffalo Sabres – 108 pts (0.444) Tampa Bay Lightning – 106 pts (0.436) Montreal Canadiens – 106 pts (0.436) Pittsburgh Penguins – 98 pts (0.403) Boston Bruins – 98 pts (0.403) Ottawa Senators – 97 pts (0.399) Philadelphia Flyers – 96 pts (0.395) Washington Capitals – 93 pts (0.383) Detroit Red Wings – 92 pts (0.379) Columbus Blue Jackets – 92 pts (0.379) New York Islanders – 91 pts (0.374) New Jersey Devils – 87 pts (0.358) Florida Panthers – 82 pts (0.337) Toronto Maple Leafs – 78 pts (0.321) New York Rangers – 75 pts (0.309) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
